name: Needs Clarification
description: The opportunity may be real, but the scope, pay, task count, or acceptance rules need to be clarified before touching it.

name: Scope Creep Risk
description: The buyer may expect unlimited revisions, unclear batches, ongoing support, or extra work beyond the stated task.

name: Pay/Scope Mismatch
description: The work may be real, but the pay does not match the time, effort, or complexity.

name: Access Risk
description: The task asks for login access, admin access, account control, or unnecessary private files.

name: Sensitive Data Risk
description: The task may involve private customer data, financial documents, health details, legal records, or other sensitive information.

name: Expert Work Risk
description: The task requires professional judgment, regulated expertise, or high-liability review even if it is marketed as beginner work.

name: Platform Risk
description: The work depends on a platform with inconsistent task supply, opaque review, unclear approval rules, or account risk.

name: Scam Pattern
description: The opportunity shows classic scam signs such as upfront payment, vague easy work, weird payment methods, pressure, or fake recruiter behavior.
